mapper.select: SELECT 전담자번호 memberLoginPK, 지점 memberBranch, 이름 memberUserName, 권한 memberRole, 아이디 memberUserID, 비밀번호 memberUserPW, 관리자권한 memberISManager, 등록일 memberRegDate, 고유번호 memberUniqueNumber FROM J_참여자관리_로그인정보 WHERE 아이디=#{memberUserID} AND 아이디사용여부 = '사용'
SELECT 전담자번호 memberLoginPK, 지점 memberBranch, 이름 memberUserName, 권한 memberRole, 아이디 memberUserID FROM J_참여자관리_로그인정보 WHERE 지점=#{memberBranch}
mapper.update: UPDATE J_직원_계정 SET 비밀번호 = #{memberUserPW}, 비밀번호변경일 = GETDATE() WHERE 아이디 = #{memberUserID}
UPDATE J_직원 SET 전화번호 = #{memberPhoneNumber}, 이메일 = #{memberEmail}, 수정일 = GETDATE() WHERE 아이디 = #{memberUserID}

IF EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM J_참여자관리_일일업무보고 WHERE 아이디 = #{memberUserID} AND 지점 = #{memberBranch} AND 업무보고일 = CONVERT(CHAR(10), GETDATE(), 23) ) BEGIN UPDATE J_참여자관리_일일업무보고 SET 금일일반취업 = #{memberTodayEmployment}, 금일알선취업 = #{memberTodayPlacement}, 금주일반취업 = #{memberToWeekEmployment}, 금주알선취업 = #{memberToWeekPlacement}, 금월일반취업 = #{memberToMonthEmployment}, 금월알선취업 = #{memberToMonthPlacement}, 금년일반취업 = #{memberToYearEmployment}, 금년알선취업 = #{memberToYearPlacement}, 실적수정일 = GETDATE() WHERE 아이디 = #{memberUserID} AND 지점 = #{memberBranch} AND 업무보고일 = CONVERT(CHAR(10), GETDATE(), 23) END ELSE BEGIN INSERT INTO J_참여자관리_일일업무보고 (지점, 아이디, 금일일반취업, 금일알선취업, 금주일반취업, 금주알선취업, 금월일반취업, 금월알선취업, 금년일반취업, 금년알선취업, 업무보고일) VALUES ( #{memberBranch}, #{memberUserID}, #{memberTodayEmployment}, #{memberTodayPlacement}, #{memberToWeekEmployment}, #{memberToWeekPlacement}, #{memberToMonthEmployment}, #{memberToMonthPlacement}, #{memberToYearEmployment}, #{memberToYearPlacement}, CONVERT(CHAR(10), GETDATE(), 23) ) END
mapper.select: SELECT A.전담자번호, A.이름 memberUserName, A.아이디 memberUserID, A.지점 memberBranch, A.전화번호 memberPhoneNumber, A.등록일 memberRegDate, A.고유번호 memberUniqueNumber, A.이메일 memberEmail, A.아이디사용여부, A.입사일 memberJoinedDate, A.최종발령일 memberAssignedDate, A.근속기간구분 memberContinuous, ISNULL(B.금일일반취업, 0) memberTodayEmployment, ISNULL(B.금일알선취업, 0) memberTodayPlacement, ISNULL(B.금주일반취업, 0) memberToWeekEmployment, ISNULL(B.금주알선취업, 0) memberToWeekPlacement, ISNULL(B.금월일반취업, 0) memberToMonthEmployment, ISNULL(B.금월알선취업, 0) memberToMonthPlacement, ISNULL(B.금년일반취업, 0) memberToYearEmployment, ISNULL(B.금년알선취업, 0) memberToYearPlacement, B.업무보고일 endUpdateStatus FROM J_참여자관리_로그인정보 A LEFT OUTER JOIN J_참여자관리_일일업무보고 B ON A.아이디 = B.아이디 AND B.업무보고일 = CONVERT(CHAR(10), GETDATE(), 23) WHERE A.아이디=#{memberUserID}

SELECT A.전담자번호, A.이름 memberUserName, A.아이디 memberUserID, A.지점 memberBranch, A.전화번호 memberPhoneNumber, A.등록일 memberRegDate, A.고유번호 memberUniqueNumber, A.이메일 memberEmail, A.아이디사용여부, A.입사일 memberJoinedDate, A.최종발령일 memberAssignedDate, A.근속기간구분 memberContinuous, ISNULL(B.금일일반취업, 0) memberTodayEmployment, ISNULL(B.금일알선취업, 0) memberTodayPlacement, ISNULL(B.금주일반취업, 0) memberToWeekEmployment, ISNULL(B.금주알선취업, 0) memberToWeekPlacement, ISNULL(B.금월일반취업, 0) memberToMonthEmployment, ISNULL(B.금월알선취업, 0) memberToMonthPlacement, ISNULL(B.금년일반취업, 0) memberToYearEmployment, ISNULL(B.금년알선취업, 0) memberToYearPlacement, B.업무보고일 endUpdateStatus FROM J_참여자관리_로그인정보 A LEFT OUTER JOIN J_참여자관리_일일업무보고 B ON A.아이디 = B.아이디 AND B.업무보고일 = CONVERT(CHAR(10), GETDATE(), 23) WHERE A.아이디=#{memberUserID}
SELECT 지점 AS branchName FROM J_참여자관리_지점 WHERE 사용여부 = '사용' ORDER BY 순서 ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM J_직원_사이트접속 WHERE 직원아이디 = #{memberUserID} AND 사이트코드 = N'COUNSEL' AND 접속허용 = 1
SELECT TOP 1 사이트내권한 AS memberRole FROM J_직원_사이트접속 WHERE 직원아이디 = #{memberUserID} AND 사이트코드 = N'COUNSEL' AND 부서코드 IS NULL
